function.name: create_or_update_contact
function.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM or update an existing contact with provided information. This function handles all contact-related operations including creation, updates, and association with companies and deals. It supports batch operations and can process multiple contacts simultaneously for improved performance.

email.title: Contact Email Address
email.description: The primary email address of the contact. This field is used as a unique identifier and must be a valid email format. Example: john.doe@company.com

properties.title: Contact Properties
properties.description: A collection of standard and custom properties to set on the contact. Standard properties include firstname, lastname, phone, etc. Custom properties must be created in HubSpot first.

firstname.title: First Name
firstname.description: The contact's first name. Will be used in personalization tokens and display.

lastname.title: Last Name
lastname.description: The contact's last name or family name. Combined with firstname for full name display.

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.description: Primary phone number for the contact. Supports international formats with country codes.

company.title: Company Name
company.description: The name of the company where the contact works. This is a text field, not an association.

jobtitle.title: Job Title
jobtitle.description: The contact's job title or position within their company. Used for segmentation and personalization.

lifecyclestage.title: Lifecycle Stage
lifecyclestage.description: The current stage of the contact in your sales/marketing funnel. This is a key property for automation and reporting.

hs_lead_status.title: Lead Status
hs_lead_status.description: The current status of the lead in your sales process. Helps track progress through the pipeline.

hubspot_owner_id.title: HubSpot Owner ID
hubspot_owner_id.description: The ID of the HubSpot user who owns this contact. Use the owners API to get valid owner IDs.

address.title: Street Address
address.description: The street address of the contact's primary location.

city.title: City
city.description: The city where the contact is located.

state.title: State/Region
state.description: The state, province, or region where the contact is located.

zip.title: Postal Code
zip.description: The postal or ZIP code for the contact's address.

country.title: Country
country.description: The country where the contact is located. Use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes.

website.title: Website URL
website.description: The personal or company website associated with this contact.

hs_persona.title: Persona
hs_persona.description: The buyer persona that best describes this contact. Personas are defined in your HubSpot settings.

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: The industry sector in which the contact's company operates.

annualrevenue.title: Annual Revenue
annualrevenue.description: The annual revenue of the contact's company in your account's default currency.

numberofemployees.title: Number of Employees
numberofemployees.description: The approximate number of employees at the contact's company.

associations.title: Object Associations
associations.description: List of associations to create between this contact and other HubSpot objects like companies, deals, or tickets.

to.description: The target object to associate with this contact.

id.description: The ID of the object to associate with.

types.description: The types of associations to create.

associationTypeId.description: The numeric ID of the association type. 1 = Primary company, 279 = Contact to deal.

options.title: Operation Options
options.description: Additional options controlling how the operation is performed.

idProperty.description: The property to use for identifying existing contacts. Default is 'email'.

inputs.description: For batch operations, an array of input objects. Each follows the same schema as the parent.
